title: should display hero error state with fix-query card on SQL syntax error
verifies: Submitting an invalid SQL query triggers the QueryErrorState hero layout with Fix Query action card, error detail panel, and summary text visible

title: should toggle error detail panel expand and collapse
verifies: Clicking the error detail toggle button expands the detail body on first click and collapses it on the second click

title: should copy error details and show Copied feedback
verifies: The Copy Error Details button is visible and clicking it shows 'Copied!' feedback for 2 seconds

title: should display no-events state with expand range and remove filter cards
verifies: A valid SQL query returning 0 results renders the LogsNoEventsState with Expand Time Range and Remove Filter action cards

title: should focus search bar editor on fix-query card click
verifies: Clicking the Fix Query action card emits fix-query and the parent component focuses the Monaco search bar editor

title: should display filter error state for multi-stream filter mismatch
verifies: Multi-stream filter error container appears when a filter field is missing from some selected streams — skipped pending multi-stream schema setup

title: 'Ask AI' button should NOT be visible in OSS edition — not wired: aiEnabled computed from config.isEnterprise at Index.vue:1497-1499
verifies: The Ask AI button is never rendered in OSS edition — fixme placeholder until enterprise licensing is available

title: should display informational message when org has no streams
verifies: When an organization has zero log streams, the LogsNoDataState renders a no-streams informational container — skipped pending empty org setup
